ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "nps" INTEGER /* Employee satisfaction score (NPS) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* County of residence (foreign key to counties) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State of residence (foreign key to states) */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Employment status (foreign key to employment_statuses) */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender of the employee (foreign key to genders) */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Ethnic group of the employee (foreign key to ethnic_groups) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "payment_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of payment (foreign key to payment_frequencies) */,
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of contract (foreign key to contract_types) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department to which the employee belongs (foreign key to departments) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Employee's salary */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_contract_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type_id") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_payment_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_frequency_id") REFERENCES payment_frequencies ("payment_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_frequencies" (
  "payment_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment frequency */,
  "payment_frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "contract_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the contract belongs to */,
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was last renewed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contract_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type_id") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department to which the user belongs (foreign key to departments) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract history entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the contract */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_history_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Resume, ID) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
